About.title: ヒロタ
About.intro: は、高級空手衣と空手用具を専門とする日本の製造メーカーです。
About.history: 【JA】Founded in 1965, the company has established a long-standing reputation for precision craftsmanship, material excellence, and uncompromising quality. HIROTA uniforms are trusted and worn by masters, instructors, and elite competitors at the highest levels of traditional and competitive karate worldwide.
About.tokyoTitle: 東京本社 Tokyo Head Office
About.tokyoAddress: 〒144-0052 東京都大田区蒲田5-33-6 NSビル1F
About.fukuokaAddress: 〒812-0018 福岡県福岡市博多区住吉4-2-15 住吉4ビル
About.aichiAddress: 〒445-0802 愛知県西尾市米津町連台16-3
About.hoursClosed: 日曜・祝日・毎月第2土曜: 定休日
About.visitTitle: ※ ご来店・採寸のご予約について
About.visitP1: 【JA】To ensure proper attention and accurate measurement, please make a reservation before visiting any HIROTA location. Please call the branch you plan to visit and make a reservation in advance.
About.visitP2: 【JA】If you would like to have your karate-gi measurements taken, please inform us of your height, weight, and preferred fabric type when booking. For measurement sessions, please wear or bring a T-shirt and tight-fitting bottoms (such as spats) to ensure accurate fitting.
About.visitP3: 【JA】If you visit without a reservation or during busy periods with many appointments, we may not be able to assist you. Please make sure to book your visit in advance.
